description: The static build-matrix — the default capability-provider implementation (D4′). Its impls[] array is the central registered capability adapter table (#206): one row per impl, authored by that impl but registered centrally, declaring its capability id → 3-state tier map: native-ok (the platform serves it directly) / polyfill-ok (a shim recovers the behavior) / capability-hard (a UA-privileged capability no shim can reach). The adapter table is the matrix's row source — one source of truth, no duplicated capability facts; adding a new impl is a single-row registration. Capability ids key off src/_data/capabilities.json. Grounded in reports/2026-06-02-native-platform-substrate.md. Paired with the default build venue; runtime + edge venues swap in their own provider impls (#208). #1450/#1487: broadened from native substrates to incumbent libraries as peer columns (the public /compat/ catalog) — every impl, including FUI, is just a column (no privileged/reference column; impl-neutrality is statute). Native-substrate impls use the native-first tiers (native-ok/polyfill-ok/capability-hard); library impls use a second vocabulary (supported/partial/unsupported) since a JS lib does not sit on the platform-relative axis. Library coverage is v1 and refined by the library-adapter watch (#1451).

impls.label: FACE — build-your-own
impls.summary: A custom element built on Form-Associated Custom Elements (ElementInternals): owns its value/validity and renders its own listbox via popover + anchor positioning. Maximum control; pays for native picker chrome and cross-root a11y it cannot reach.

impls.label: base-select — native progressive enhancement
impls.summary: A native customizable <select> opting into appearance: base-select: native picker, keyboard, a11y tree, and form submission for free; enhanced with arbitrary <option> markup where supported, degrading to a plain styled <select> otherwise.

impls.label: Floating UI
impls.summary: A positioning-only library (the successor to Popper.js): computes anchored coordinates for floating elements (tooltips, popovers, menus). Covers the anchor-positioning capability; it does not own the popover/dialog/select semantics those surfaces also need — a single-domain incumbent, illustrating why the compat axis is per-capability.

impls.label: Frontier UI (FUI)
impls.summary: The Web Everything reference component library — a comprehensive, framework-free component set realizing the WE intents/blocks over the native substrate. Listed as a PEER column like every other impl (#1450 ratified A): its strength is earned and visible as the column green across the most rows, never status-declared. Coverage derived from its block set (droplist/select, dialog/notification surfaces, rich-text-editor, FACE-based form controls, anchor/pan-zoom positioning, …).
